© 2026 FAN JUE
Introduction

About Me

Hi, Fan Jue (范珏) here! I am a CS PhD student in School of Computing at National University of Singapore (NUS). I am very fortunate to be advised by Prof. Bryan Kian Hsiang Low and Dr. Nancy F. Chen. My research primarily focuses on data-efficient AI and answering the question: how much is the data worth?

Before my doctoral studies, I completed my undergraduate studies at NUS (too), where I obtained a Bachelor of Science (Highest Distinction) degree in Applied Mathematics and a Bachelor of Computing (Highest Distinction) degree in Computer Science. I started my journey in research during Undergraduate Research Opportunities Programme (UROP) and continued in my Final Year Project (FYP). My FYP thesis was supervised by Prof. Bryan Kian Hsiang Low and Prof. Jonathan Scarlett and in collaboration with Dr. Rachael Hwee Ling Sim and Xiao Tian.

Research keeps my head in the clouds; traveling and dancing keep my feet on the ground (and occasionally off it), see SIDE MISSIONS.

Position PhD Student, 2025 Spring Institution National University of Singapore Location Singapore Interests Data-Efficient AI, Trustworthy AI
Latest Updates
  • May 2026 🎉 Our paper titled Is Data Shapley Not Better than Random in Data Selection? Ask NASH has been accepted as a ✨spotlight✨ paper at ICML 2026. See you in Seoul! →
  • May 2026 🎉 Our paper titled Incentivizing Truthfulness and Collaborative Fairness in Bayesian Learning has been accepted as a ✨spotlight✨ paper at ICML 2026. See you in Seoul! →
  • Apr 2026 🇧🇷 I attended ICLR 2026 in Rio de Janeiro!
  • Feb 2026 🎉 Our paper titled INO-SGD: Addressing Utility Imbalance under Individualized Differential Privacy! has been accepted as a poster at ICLR 2026. See you in Rio! →
  • Jul 2025 🎓 I attended commencement ceremonies for my Bachelor’s degrees. Graduated just in time for the NUS120 limited-edition swag!
  • Jan 2025 🎓 I was officially conferred my Bachelor’s degrees!
  • Jan 2025 📚 Decided that two degrees from NUS weren’t enough, so I started round three - the PhD!
  • Dec 2024 📜 I was placed on the Dean’s List for Bachelor of Science!
  • Oct 2024 🏆 I received the A*STAR Computing and Information Science (ACIS) AGS (Computing) Scholarship for my PhD studies. Grateful for the support!
  • Oct 2024 🏆 I was honored to be selected for the NUS Presidential Graduate Fellowship for my PhD studies.
  • Sep 2024 🏆 I was happy to receive the NUS Research Scholarship for my PhD studies.
